overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking then running through the sunlit Mediterranean-style city of Beauclair. The character descends from a stone archway entrance through cobblestone streets with vibrant flower boxes, then turns onto a winding lakeside path offering panoramic views of the distant lake and mountains before approaching an inner town gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway entrance to hillside town

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the stone archway entrance, passing armored guards and descending the sloping cobblestone path

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing by the wall watching pedestrians pass

entered.detail: large stone archway framing the entrance to the town with heavy wooden doors
colorful patterned cobblestone ground with red and beige stones
stone buildings with red tile roofs and wooden balconies adorned with flowers
blue lake visible through the archway with mountains in the background

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a stone archway entrance into the sunlit town of Beauclair. The cobblestone path is lined with vibrant flower boxes and purple lavender bushes, while armored guards stand watch along the walls. Through the archway, the blue lake and distant mountains are visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside street with panoramic lake view

events.description: exits the enclosed archway into the open hillside street with full sky visibility
Geralt transitions from walking to running down the slope
Geralt makes a sharp right turn onto the lakeside path

agents.ego_description: Geralt breaks into a run down the cobblestone street, then turns right onto a path overlooking the lake

notable_agents.action: villager in simple clothes walking along the street

entered.detail: low stone wall with decorative pillars lining the right side of the path
cluster of Mediterranean-style villas with orange terracotta roofs

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway into open sunlight, Geralt transitions from walking to running down the hillside street. The scene opens to reveal the villa district on the left and a stone retaining wall on the right. He makes a sharp right turn onto a path that offers clearer views of the distant lake and mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding lakeside path with stone balustrade

agents.ego_description: Geralt running along the winding cobblestone path with the lake and mountains visible to the right

notable_agents.action: armored guard leaning against the stone balustrade overlooking the lake

entered.detail: decorative stone wall with pillars and coping stones overlooking the water
expansive blue lake with distant shorelines and boats visible

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs along a winding lakeside path bordered by a decorative stone balustrade on the right. The expansive blue lake of Beauclair stretches out to the right with mountains framing the horizon, while an armored guard leans against the wall enjoying the view. The path curves gently as it follows the hillside contour.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper town street approaching a gate archway

events.description: approaching the stone archway entrance to the inner town district

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues running along the winding path, approaching a stone archway with other villagers visible ahead

notable_agents.action: villager walking through the archway ahead of Geralt

entered.detail: stone archway entrance with iron fixtures leading into the town center
tall stone building with a clock tower visible above the rooftops

segments.scene_description: The path continues winding through the upper town, with the lake view giving way to more buildings. Geralt approaches a stone archway entrance leading deeper into the town, passing a guard and heading toward the clock tower district. The cobblestone street narrows as it approaches the gate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from a guarded stone entrance through the sunlit, scenic heights of Beauclair toward the inner town. It begins with Geralt walking through a stone archway lined with purple lavender and flower boxes, with a glimpse of a distant blue lake and mountains. As he emerges into the open sunlight, he transitions into a run down a hillside street, passing the villa district before making a sharp right turn that opens the vista to the expansive lake. The scene then shifts to a winding lakeside path bordered by a decorative stone balustrade, where the camera follows the hillside contour past a resting guard. Finally, the panoramic lake views give way to the architecture of the upper town as the cobblestone street narrows, leading Geralt through another stone archway toward the clock tower district.
